name: Datacenter Buildout Investor
nl_description: I invest in datacenter and energy infrastructure. Track grid capacity rules for AI workloads, datacenter siting permits, transmission permitting and NEPA reform, FERC interconnection rules, fab subsidies under CHIPS Act, and any state/local moratoria on hyperscaler datacenters.

structured.notes: Investor focus on datacenter/energy infrastructure: FERC interconnection rules and state/local hyperscaler datacenter moratoria are explicit interests.
